chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6623 of 2015 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- FOR DIRECTIONS 1. For order on Misc. No.33147/15 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection No.1 (Maintainability). 3. For order on Misc. No.33148/15 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of Main Case -------------------------------------- 27.10.2015. Mr. Muhammad Asif Qureshi, advocate for the petitioners. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Through this petition, the petitioners, mainly, seek cancellation of registered documents i.e. sub-power of attorney and the sub-lease which, according to them, have been obtained by the private respondents in collusion with the official respondents by means of fraud. We are of the view that the dispute between the parties appears to be that of a civil nature and question of playing fraud and forgery in registration of documents can only be resolved after recording of evidence and the same cannot be resolved by this Court under its Constitutional jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. Therefore, the instant petition, being not maintainable, is dismissed in limine along with the listed application. However, the Petitioners are at liberty to approach the competent forum for redressal of their grievance, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
